landing.title: Clockwise's Next Chapter
landing.text:
Clockwise's Next Chapter
Our Next Chapter
A new chapter for our team, and an important update for our
                      customers
From the earliest days of Clockwise, it has been our mission
                    to help the world make time for what matters. We've built a business to be proud of, serving
                    some of the most impressive customers like Uber, Netflix, and Atlassian. And the impact has been far
                    reaching, with over 8 million hours of Focus Time created and 23 million meetings moved to better
                    times.
We’ve been building AI into the heart of scheduling long before it became the
                    defining technology of our time. Along the way, we've developed deep expertise in scheduling
                    and calendars. Hard-won knowledge from nearly a decade of tackling one of the most underestimated
                    problems in the modern workplace: shared time. It's a problem we care deeply about, and one
                    that isn't going away.
That's why we're excited about this next chapter:
                    the Clockwise team is joining Salesforce.
We believe this move will allow us to have even
                    greater impact by bringing our deep expertise in building reliable, agentic software to the Agentic
                    Enterprise.
As part of this transition, Clockwise will be going away. Our product will no
                    longer be available starting on
March 27, 2026.
To our customers, we
                    want to thank you. You have inspired us to keep building and we deeply appreciate the trust
                    you've placed with us. We don't take lightly what you gave us — your time, your trust, and
                    your belief in what we were building.
Frequently Asked Questions
How will the events on my calendar be impacted when the
                                  Clockwise services end?
Any Smart Hold events created by Clockwise (such as Focus Time, Travel Time,
                                      Meeting Breaks, and Personal Calendar synced events) will be removed from your
                                      calendar. Flexible Meetings will stop moving and the green Clockwise sparkle will
                                      be removed.
What about my Clockwise Scheduling Links? Will they stop
                                  working?
Yes, Clockwise Scheduling Links will no longer be available. We recommend
                                      transitioning your links immediately to another service, such as
Reclaim
.
Will my Focus Time blocks just disappear from my calendar or
                                  stay as-is?
All Focus Time blocks managed by Clockwise will be removed from your calendar.
Data
How do I export my data?
Please direct any questions related to your data to offboarding@getclockwise.com.
Will Salesforce have access to my data?
No, there is no transfer of data to Salesforce, and your data will be deleted.
What happens to all my data — my calendar preferences,
                                  Scheduling Links, and Focus Time settings?
Your data will be deleted shortly after you lose access to the product on March
                                      27, 2026.
How long will Clockwise retain my data after shutdown and
                                  when will it be deleted?
All user data will be deleted shortly after March 27, 2026. There will be no
                                      confirmation of this deletion, but there will be notice if the deletion date
                                      changes and/or there are changes to our decision to delete all user data.
Billing
Will I get a refund for unused subscription time?
You will get a refund for any prepaid subscription that extends past March 27,
                                      2026, on a prorated basis. For example, if you're on an annual plan that
                                      renews on September 1, 2026, and you've prepaid for the full year, you would
                                      receive a refund for the unused portion of your subscription from March 27 through
                                      August 31, 2026.
Will my card be charged again before shutdown?
We are trying to avoid any charges before shutdown. If for some reason you do get
                                      charged, please know that amount will be added to your refund.
Will I be able to access prior invoices?
Past invoices will be accessible on the
Plans & Billing
                                        page
until March 27th, 2026.
What's Next
Are there other tools Clockwise recommends as an
                                  alternative?
Yes, we’ve partnered with
Reclaim
to provide a smooth transition for anyone looking for AI-powered scheduling and
                                      calendar optimization.  Reclaim offers a solution we feel confident recommending
                                      to Clockwise users and customers looking for intelligent scheduling of Focus Time,
                                      Habits, and Smart Meetings.
Reclaim has committed to the following support for Clockwise paid customers
100% price match guarantee for migrating team
Priority migration support to help replicate your Clockwise setup
Dedicated onboarding webinars throughout March for Clockwise users
Enterprise onboarding assistance for larger teams
Fast-tracked security reviews (SOC 2 Type II, SSO & SCIM support – trust
                                        center)
You can
find
                                        more information here
.
Is there a migration guide to help me recreate my setup
                                  elsewhere?
Yes, Reclaim has created a custom guide for Clockwise customers to help with the
                                      transition. It includes details on the benefits they’re providing exclusively to
                                      former Clockwise customers and details about how to get started. You can find the
                                      guide
here
.
Support
Who can I contact if I have questions or issues during the
                                  wind-down period?
Please contact offboarding@getclockwise.com.
How long will customer support be available?
Customer support will be available until March 27, 2026.
We'd like to thank the 40,000 organizations who made time for what
                  matters with Clockwise
See more
See less
We're so grateful we could help. Together we made your calendars better,
                to the tune of:
8 million
hours of Focus Time created
23 million
meetings rescheduled
From the whole team, thank you!

hits.title: James Webb Space Telescope reveals that most galaxies rotate clockwise
Medieval staircases were not built going clockwise for the defender's advantage
The Clockwise/Spiral Rule of C declarations

analysis.name: Clockwise
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered calendar optimization that automatically schedules focus time and moves meetings to create more uninterrupted work time for teams.
analysis.ideal_customer: Knowledge workers and teams at tech-forward companies needing automated calendar optimization and focus time protection

features.name: focus time
features.description: Automatically schedules blocks of uninterrupted work time on your calendar
features.evidence_quote: over 8 million hours of Focus Time created

features.name: flexible meetings
features.description: Meetings that automatically move within a defined window to optimize the team schedule
features.evidence_quote: 23 million meetings moved to better times

features.name: scheduling links
features.description: Shareable booking links for external and internal scheduling
features.evidence_quote: Clockwise Scheduling Links will no longer be available

features.name: travel time
features.description: Automatically adds travel time buffers around in-person events
features.evidence_quote: Smart Hold events created by Clockwise (such as Focus Time, Travel Time, Meeting Breaks

features.name: meeting breaks
features.description: Automatically inserts short breaks between back-to-back meetings
features.evidence_quote: Smart Hold events created by Clockwise (such as Focus Time, Travel Time, Meeting Breaks

features.name: personal calendar sync
features.description: Syncs personal calendar events to block time on work calendar without sharing details
features.evidence_quote: Personal Calendar synced events will be removed from your calendar

features.name: smart holds
features.description: AI-managed calendar blocks that protect time and auto-adjust as the schedule changes
features.evidence_quote: Any Smart Hold events created by Clockwise...will be removed from your calendar

features.name: ai scheduling
features.description: AI engine that optimizes team calendars by finding optimal meeting times
features.evidence_quote: We've been building AI into the heart of scheduling long before it became the defining technology

features.name: calendar preferences
features.description: User-configurable preferences governing when and how the AI schedules events
features.evidence_quote: your calendar preferences, Scheduling Links, and Focus Time settings

features.name: team calendar optimization
features.description: Coordinates scheduling across entire teams to minimize fragmentation
features.evidence_quote: serving some of the most impressive customers like Uber, Netflix, and Atlassian

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on support for enterprise customers
features.evidence_quote: Fast-tracked security reviews (SOC 2 Type II, SSO & SCIM support – trust center)

features.name: scim provisioning
features.description: SCIM-based user provisioning and deprovisioning for enterprise
features.evidence_quote: SOC 2 Type II, SSO & SCIM support – trust center

features.name: soc 2 compliance
features.description: SOC 2 Type II certification for enterprise security compliance
features.evidence_quote: Fast-tracked security reviews (SOC 2 Type II, SSO & SCIM support – trust center)

differentiators: AI built into scheduling 'long before it became the defining technology of our time'
Automatic meeting relocation — not just blocking, but actively moving meetings to better times
Smart Holds that dynamically adjust rather than static calendar blocks
Team-wide calendar optimization across shared time, not just individual productivity

recent_ships.what: Product shutdown announced; team acquired by Salesforce
recent_ships.source: the Clockwise team is joining Salesforce...product will no longer be available starting on March 27, 2026

praised: Focus Time automation was highly valued — 8M hours created cited as key impact metric
Meeting optimization at scale: 23M meetings moved to better times
Enterprise adoption at Uber, Netflix, Atlassian suggests strong team-wide coordination value
